summary: Iteration 40 - Hybrid Liquidity Engine & Wallet Fix Testing Complete. All 25 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Wallet & Banking page loads without 'body stream already read' errors (fixed with safeFetch/response.clone()), Admin Dashboard shows REAL MODE banner with Instant Withdraw: ACTIVE.

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Wallet & Banking and Admin Dashboard verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Hybrid Liquidity Engine fully tested. All endpoints working correctly. (1) GET /api/hybrid/status returns engine=hybrid_liquidity, execution_priority=[internal_match, market_maker, dex_fallback], spread config (base_bps=200, min_bps=100, max_bps=300, fee_pct=0.5), order_book stats, volume metrics, volume_tiers. (2) GET /api/hybrid/spread returns dynamic spread with spread_bps (100-300 range), skew_bps, inventory_position, total_cost_pct. (3) POST /api/hybrid/order places orders for internal matching, returns order_id, status, match result. (4) POST /api/hybrid/execute executes with priority (internal_match→market_maker→dex_fallback), returns execution_type and success=true. (5) All /api/live endpoints verified: pipeline/assess, dex/liquidity/NENO (has_liquidity=true), dex/quote (PancakeSwap V2), dex/history. (6) GET /api/sync/state returns real_mode=true. (7) GET /api/sync/instant-withdraw/status returns active=true. (8) GET /api/cashout/status returns running status with EUR accounts (IT, BE). (9) GET /api/circle/wallets/balances returns 3 segregated wallets (CLIENT, TREASURY, REVENUE). Frontend: Wallet & Banking page loads all 4 tabs (Wallet, Unificato, On-Chain, Banking) without 'body stream already read' errors. Admin Dashboard shows REAL MODE banner with Instant Withdraw: ACTIVE.
